fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.helpText: Any HTTPS endpoint that accepts POST with a JSON body. Personas sends `{ text, event }` where `event` is the full PersonaEvent payload.

metadata.summary: Generic JSON outbound webhook. POSTs `{ text: <rendered template>, event: <full event payload> }` to any user-supplied HTTPS URL. Use for PagerDuty Events v2, custom Zapier hooks, or any in-house alert pipeline.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Decide which endpoint should receive Personas events.
2. Paste the full HTTPS URL here. Internal/private IPs are blocked by the SSRF guard.
3. (Optional) Use the template editor on the subscription to shape the `text` field per event type.
